meaning: n.[音]大音阶的第五音,[化]溶胶
examples: Sol Axelrod, 37, the manager of the Home Depot here, fittingly learned to fix his own car as a teenager, even changing the brakes.
The laboratory confirmed cases were reported from the three states of Goias, Distrito Federal and Mato Grosso do Sol.
Sol Sender: We got the job through Mode.
Ducking in to El Jibarito on Calle Sol, Puerto Rican flags hung proudly from the walls.
Billie Sol Estes turned himself into a legend as the greatest flimflam artist in Texas history.
